Title: Paryushana Parva Celebrations 2024
Body: DJCHC celebrated the 10-day Paryushana Mahaparva with great devotion. Special pravachans, Samayik sessions, and Pratikraman were organized daily. The community participated in large numbers with families coming together for this sacred festival.

Title: Mahavir Jayanti Grand Celebration
Body: The birth anniversary of Lord Mahavir was celebrated with a grand Shobha Yatra (procession) in the Hi-Tec City area. Cultural programs by children, abhishek of Bhagwan Mahavir, and community bhojan were the highlights of the event.

Title: Youth Wing — Pathshala Programs
Body: Weekly Pathshala (religious education) classes are being conducted for children and youth every Sunday. The curriculum covers Jain philosophy, stories of Tirthankaras, Sanskrit shlokas, and moral values.

Title: Health Camp & Blood Donation Drive
Body: DJCHC organized a free health check-up camp and blood donation drive as part of its social welfare initiatives. Over 100 community members participated in the blood donation drive.

Title: Kshamavani Diwas — Day of Forgiveness
Body: The community gathered to seek and grant forgiveness on Kshamavani Diwas, marking the conclusion of Paryushana. "Micchami Dukkadam" echoed through the halls as members embraced the spirit of universal forgiveness.
